control_awareness: Aware of amount-based approval requiring department head approval for amounts >= 1,000,000 (P2P-C-001), segregation of duties preventing self-approval (P2P-C-002), and pre-PO approval requirement (P2P-C-003).
expected_control_effect: The purchase request will be routed for department head approval before PO issuance to satisfy controls.
overall_reason: Given no quarter-end pressure and the preference for straightforward and auditable process, creating a single purchase request for the full amount with normal routing is appropriate. This satisfies all control requirements and aligns with operational context and requester objectives.
reason: The purchase amount (1,750,000) exceeds the manager approval threshold of 1,000,000, so it requires department head approval. Creating one consolidated purchase request is operationally reasonable and preferred as there is no quarter-end pressure. The system-enforced controls will require the appropriate approval before purchase order issuance.
